detailedDescription:
64GB DDR4 quad-channel or dual-channel kit.
Built for workstations, video editors, and professionals running memory-intensive apps.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 64GB
Generation: DDR4
Bandwidth: Up to 25.6 GB/s per channel (DDR4-3200)
Voltage: 1.2V (1.35V for XMP/OC)
Slots: 4 x 16GB or 2 x 32GB
XMP / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1700, AM4, LGA2066 (HEDT)
